lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Good day to you, hearty warrior! May the spirits guide you.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Welcome back, friend of the spirits. I am humbled in your presence. You are no longer the apprentice, but the master. Seek to inspire all with your daring deeds and legendary feats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have anything for me?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: I see you have free space and no way to record any information you may recover from the caverns. Please take this book as a record of your researches.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of information are you thinking of?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Those who have previously entered the cavern have not all returned. Some of them seemed intent upon research and discovery as much as loot and daring deeds.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: It would be a shame if you were to recover any of their notes and be unable to record them handily. I hope the new book will give you space for such discoveries.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help me with hastae?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Perhaps. What do you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you forge anything from this broken-looking hasta?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Yes, I can work with this, but remember, you cannot comprehend how to wield a hasta until you have learned to create one by following my teachings.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, forget it.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Yes, I can work with this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, forget I asked.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you convert Zamorakian spears into hastae?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Yes, I can convert a Zamorakian spear into a hasta. The spirits require me to request 300,000 coins from you for this service.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't afford that. Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, forget it.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you convert Zamorakian hastae into spears?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Yes, I can convert a Zamorakian hasta into a spear. I do not charge for this service.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, forget I asked.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, forget it.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to smash my pots when planting trees again.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Consider it done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to be calmer and not smash my pots.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Consider it done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me more of these spirits you continually refer to?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Certainly, though it is quite simple - they are the barbarians of the past who have died in the passing of the years. There are three categories which learned sages claim may describe all spirits encountered.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: The majority are at peace, having died with their ambitions sated, even if this ambition was as simple as a glorious death. They can contact those in our world in order to spur us on to glory.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Of course, they cannot or will not contact all inhabitants of these lands, for not all are worthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So those are the spirits who give us guidance. What of the other sorts?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: A second category of spirit is made up of those who are not yet at peace. However, all that is needed is for their mortal remains to be laid to rest and they will join the peaceful majority.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can see the pyres serve this purpose. The final category is also restless?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Alas, there is a small minority who will never be at rest. These have been slain in moments of insanity by their brothers or by adventurers.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: They are not at rest and will attack those they blame for their tortured state. They are not known, however, for being able to determine this blame with any great accuracy, so should be considered dangerous to all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you Otto. It makes a bit more sense now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: I have further training for you.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Wrong! Focus your thoughts.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Correct, you've completed this part of your training.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Please tell me your answer.

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Nope, Go check again!

lines.speaker: Otto Godblessed
lines.text: Spot on!
